title: The Future Is Domain-Specific Agents - Justin Schroeder, StandardAgents
summary: Justin Schroeder argues that domain-specific agents composed together deliver superior performance, reliability, and cost efficiency compared to traditional skill-based approaches. He claims this architecture enables smaller models to handle real work and shifts AI from internal copilots to customer-facing products.
writeup: Justin Schroeder of StandardAgents makes the case that composing domain-specific agents outperforms traditional skill-based approaches on performance, reliability, and cost. The talk argues this architecture lets smaller models handle real work, and it frames a shift from internal copilots toward customer-facing AI products. The core claim is that orchestrating narrow, domain-focused agents is the path to dependable, economical systems.
